# discord_invite (Resource)

Manages a Discord invite.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `channel_id` (String) The ID of the channel the invite is for.
- `server_id` (String) The ID of the server the invite is for.

### Optional

- `max_age` (Number) Duration of invite in seconds (0 for never).
- `max_uses` (Number) Maximum number of uses (0 for unlimited).
- `target_type` (Number) Invite target type (0 = STREAM, 1 = EMBEDDED_APPLICATION, 2 = ROLE_SUBSCRIPTION_TEMPLATE).
- `temporary` (Boolean) Whether the invite grants temporary membership.
- `unique` (Boolean) Whether the invite is unique (don't reuse similar invites).

### Read-Only

- `code` (String) The unique invite code.
